headline: A Look At Yum! Brands (YUM) Valuation As Hedge Funds Buy In And Taco Bell Expands Menu
summary: Recent hedge fund moves into Yum! Brands (YUM), alongside Taco Bell making Nacho Fries a permanent menu item and adding more than 20 products, give investors fresh reasons to recheck the stock’s current setup. See our latest analysis for Yum! Brands. Yum! Brands’ recent Taco Bell menu push and new hedge fund positions come as the share price sits at US$156.25, with a 1 month share price return of a 3.06% decline but a 3 year total shareholder return of 29.62%, suggesting longer term momentum...
